steps.message:
<system-reminder># System Information

Operating System: linux
Default Shell: 
Home Directory: /home/user
Current Working Directory: /home/user/repo
Current Time: Thu Mar 12 2026 08:14:26 GMT+0000 (Coordinated Universal Time)

# Current Working Directory (/home/user/repo) Files
.jj
src
src/config.py

# GIT STATUS
Current branch: HEAD
Main branch (you will usually use this for PRs): 

Status:
UU src/config.py

Recent commits:
5a475cf branch-a: update database config
34c74f8 base: initial config

# TODOs
No TODOs yet, if you are working on tasks that would benefit from a todo list please use the todoWrite tool to create one.</system-reminder>
The repository at `/home/user/repo` has a merge commit `merge-ab` that merges two branches (`branch-a` and `branch-b`) which both modified `src/config.py` from a common base. The merge has conflicts.

Resolve all conflicts in `src/config.py` keeping the database settings (host, port, name, max connections) from `branch-a` and the logging/timeout settings (LOG\_LEVEL, TIMEOUT) from `branch-b`. Mark the resolution complete so no conflicts remain. Write a conflict resolution summary to `/home/user/resolution_summary.md`.

todos.content: Inspect merge conflict in src/config.py and determine desired combined resolution
Resolve conflicts in src/config.py with branch-a database settings and branch-b logging/timeout settings
Write conflict resolution summary to /home/user/resolution_summary.md
Verify src/config.py no longer has conflict markers and repository conflict is resolved

Resolve conflicts in src/config.py with branch-a database settings and branch-b logging/timeout settings
Write conflict resolution summary to /home/user/resolution_summary.md
Verify src/config.py no longer has conflict markers and repository conflict is resolved

arguments.content:
# Configuration file
DATABASE_HOST = "db.production.example.com"
DATABASE_PORT = 5433
DATABASE_NAME = "mydb_prod"
LOG_LEVEL = "DEBUG"
MAX_CONNECTIONS = 50
TIMEOUT = 60

todos.content: Inspect merge conflict in src/config.py and determine desired combined resolution
Resolve conflicts in src/config.py with branch-a database settings and branch-b logging/timeout settings
Write conflict resolution summary to /home/user/resolution_summary.md
Verify src/config.py no longer has conflict markers and repository conflict is resolved

arguments.content:
# Conflict Resolution Summary

Resolved merge conflicts in `src/config.py` by combining settings from both branches as requested.

## Kept from branch-a
- `DATABASE_HOST = "db.production.example.com"`
- `DATABASE_PORT = 5433`
- `DATABASE_NAME = "mydb_prod"`
- `MAX_CONNECTIONS = 50`

## Kept from branch-b
- `LOG_LEVEL = "DEBUG"`
- `TIMEOUT = 60`

## Result
The conflict markers were removed and `src/config.py` now contains the requested merged configuration.

todos.content: Inspect merge conflict in src/config.py and determine desired combined resolution
Resolve conflicts in src/config.py with branch-a database settings and branch-b logging/timeout settings
Write conflict resolution summary to /home/user/resolution_summary.md
Verify src/config.py no longer has conflict markers and repository conflict is resolved
Inspect merge conflict in src/config.py and determine desired combined resolution
Resolve conflicts in src/config.py with branch-a database settings and branch-b logging/timeout settings
Write conflict resolution summary to /home/user/resolution_summary.md
Verify src/config.py no longer has conflict markers and repository conflict is resolved

arguments.result:
Resolved the merge conflict in `src/config.py` with the requested combination:
- kept database settings from `branch-a`: `DATABASE_HOST`, `DATABASE_PORT`, `DATABASE_NAME`, `MAX_CONNECTIONS`
- kept logging/timeout settings from `branch-b`: `LOG_LEVEL`, `TIMEOUT`

Final `src/config.py` values:
- `DATABASE_HOST = "db.production.example.com"`
- `DATABASE_PORT = 5433`
- `DATABASE_NAME = "mydb_prod"`
- `LOG_LEVEL = "DEBUG"`
- `MAX_CONNECTIONS = 50`
- `TIMEOUT = 60`

Marked the conflict as resolved by staging `src/config.py`, so no merge conflict remains for that file.

Wrote the summary to `/home/user/resolution_summary.md`.

If you need help or want to give feedback, join the Discord at https://getpochi.com/discord. To report bugs, use https://github.com/TabbyML/pochi/issues.
